creator: apircalabu@bitdefender.com
text:
After updating from linux-flashplugin-7.0r69 to 9.0r31 linux-firefox segfaults on www.flash.com due to an embedded flash movie. linux-opera, though, is smarter and blocks the plugin, preventing it to crash.
I think it's sound related. I'm using, if that matters, snd_hda patch from http://people.freebsd.org/~ariff/

Fix: 

None yet, had to downgrade to 7.0r69
How-To-Repeat: portupgrade -o www/linux-flashplugin9 linux-flashplugin
Try to open www.flash.com using linux-firefox
